title: Understanding AI Slop
author: Sam Wheatley
text:
Understanding AI Slop
Why Editing Matters — and Why Incentives Matter Even More
Spend even a few minutes online and you’ll see the complaint everywhere:
“AI is flooding the internet with slop.”
Bland articles that feel inter…
